dreamscapes--portals_072261.seen: A blazing comet or celestial eye tearing across a striated star-streaked sky above a jagged rust-colored ridge and cresting wave of light.

dreamscapes--portals_072261.redemption: Remove or soften the ruler-straight vertical seams so the panels bleed into one continuous atmosphere, and let the color transition (navy to teal) happen as a gradient wash rather than discrete bands, so the eye feels drawn through a threshold instead of reading columns.

dreamscapes--portals_d078ac.seen: A literal hard seam splitting a starfield from an aurora-textured wall, with grid lines striping the whole canvas like a technical diagram.

dreamscapes--portals_d078ac.redemption: Remove the vertical grid seams and binaural-panel divisions entirely so the starfield and aurora-wall blend as one continuous atmosphere, letting the bright vertical band read as an actual portal edge rather than a canvas stitch.

dreamscapes--portals_eaaf10.seen: A starfield abruptly gives way through a vertiginous panel-grid into a churning aurora-lit sky over icy mountain waves, with a vortex-like comet or wormhole of light as the hinge.
dreamscapes--portals_eaaf10.reason: The paneled seam reads as an actual threshold between two worlds rather than a gimmick, and the light vortex sells the 'door where the world thins' whisper with real atmospheric depth and dream-wash texture.

dreamscapes--portals_4a99c8.seen: A paneled sky split between quiet starfield and a searing comet-wash breaking over dark sea cliffs.

dreamscapes--portals_4a99c8.redemption: Soften or thin the panel seam so the starfield bleeds into the comet-light gradually — let the threshold feel like an opening in one atmosphere, not a hard border between two different images.

goddesses-and-muses_158b0f.seen: A robed figure moving through a shadowed archway, lantern held aloft, its glow contained and steady rather than blazing.

goddesses-and-muses_dd3ed5.redemption: Resolve the face into a luminous, dignified presence (even partially veiled) so held light has a source and destination, unify the composition into a single frame without the detached inset, and let the gold gather intentionally — cradled in the hands or pooling at the hem — rather than dispersing as random sparks.
